name: Cayenne / Long Red
description: Long thin very hot chili from South America (30k–50k SHU)

name: Paprika / Spicy pimiento
description: Sweet to mildly spicy pepper used for paprika (500–5k SHU)

name: Jalapeño / Serrano
description: Mexican green chilies; medium to hot (2.5k–20k SHU)

name: Bird's Eye
description: Very hot small chili from Asia/Africa (50k–100k SHU)

name: Malagueta
description: Small very hot Brazilian chili (50k–100k SHU)

name: Biquinho
description: Small sweet or mild Brazilian chili (500–1k SHU)

name: Habanero / Scotch Bonnet
description: Very hot aromatic Caribbean chilies (100k–350k SHU)

name: Paprika / Bulgarian-type
description: Sweet thick pepper used for paprika (0–1k SHU)

name: Espelette / Basque pepper
description: Mild French chili often dried (1k–4k SHU)

name: Paprika (Hungarian-type)
description: Hungarian paprika pepper mild to medium (500–8k SHU)

name: Shatta
description: Middle Eastern chili paste pepper (20k–80k SHU)

name: Italian peperoncino
description: Small Italian chili medium heat (15k–30k SHU)

name: Harissa-specific varieties
description: Chilies used for harissa paste (20k–100k SHU)
